description: Add focused tests for an existing untested slugify module.
prompt: Add tests for src/slugify.mjs in a new tests/slugify.test.mjs file. Cover lowercasing, whitespace collapsing, special character trimming, and empty input. Keep the existing test command passing.

files.package-notes.md:
# Test notes

Use node:assert in .mjs test files. Tests should print the standard summary lines after assertions pass.
